data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of providing the original booker with credit as a thank you, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality has been implemented or tested, indicating a significant gap in coverage. The absence of any API reads or persisted state checks related to the issuance of the $20 store credit to Sarah means the requirement is not satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation or testing of the original booker credit as thank you.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for original booker credit functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the issuance of store credit to the original booker.
